info.title: College Attendance API
info.description: Versioned REST API for marking attendance, managing students/subjects, and generating detention & dashboard reports.

get.summary: Get a monthly attendance summary for a student, broken down by subject

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Format Y-m, defaults to last month

post.summary: Log in with email/username and password, receiving a JWT access + refresh token pair

423.description: Account locked due to repeated failed attempts

post.summary: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair (rotates the refresh token)

401.description: Refresh token invalid, expired, or user not found

post.summary: Log out — denylists the current access token and (optionally) revokes the refresh token

get.summary: Get a role-filtered dashboard summary (faculty, HOD, or principal view)
get.description: The shape of `data` depends on the authenticated user's role: admin/teacher get a faculty summary, hod gets a department summary, principal gets a college-wide summary.

get.summary: List detained students for a month (HOD or principal)

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Format Y-m, defaults to last month

403.description: Forbidden — hod or principal role required

post.summary: Calculate detention for a month and optionally queue notification emails (principal only)
Submit a daily attendance summary for a department/semester (HOD only)

get.summary: List historical attendance summaries for a department (HOD or principal)
get.description: HODs may only view their own department; principals may view any department.

403.description: Forbidden — may only view own department

get.summary: Get a college-wide attendance overview (principal only)

post.summary: Bulk-create/update students from a CSV file (admin only)
post.description: CSV columns (no header values required to match, but a header row is skipped): roll_number, student_name, email, department, semester

post.summary: Bulk-create/update subjects from a CSV file (admin only)
post.description: CSV columns (a header row is skipped): subject_name, subject_code, department, semester

bearerAuth.description: Enter the JWT access token returned by /api/v1/auth/login

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication: login, token refresh, logout, current user

tags.name: Principal
tags.description: College-wide overview for the principal role

tags.name: Students
tags.description: Student directory management (CRUD + bulk CSV upload)

tags.name: Subjects
tags.description: Subject catalog management (CRUD + bulk CSV upload)
